ng-add.description: Adds @koobiq/components library to the project and installs dependencies

new-icons-pack.description: Updates prefixes and names of changed/removed icons

css-selectors.description: Updates prefixes and names of changed/removed icons

deprecated-icons.description: Updates prefixes and names of changed/removed icons

empty-state-size-attr.description: Updates attr name and value in ts and html

loader-overlay-size-attr.description: Updates attr name and value in ts and html

icons-replacement.description: Updates names of icons in dedicated files

v20-upgrade.description: Migrates deprecated API removed in @koobiq/components v20.0.0

filter-bar-signals.description: Migrates KbqFilterBar consumers to the signal-based API (filter/pipeTemplates/isChanged/... reads become calls)
